idea: Weekly surge in freight logistics RSS counts on delayed container ships

data.source: public RSS feeds on maritime freight delays

behavior: Spike in news mentioning container ship delays signals supply chain stress that pressures industrial production timelines.

market_impact.rationale: Industrial sector earnings are sensitive to freight bottlenecks and delayed shipments.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly RSS count on container delay keywords increases 30% over prior week
trade_logic.exit: After 3 weeks or when RSS count normalizes below 10% above baseline

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Freight delays news volume fluctuates weekly due to port congestion and weather events.

idea: Consumer stress spike from Google Trends on urgent appliance repair searches

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for appliance repair

behavior: Increased searches for urgent appliance repair indicate rising household distress impacting discretionary spending.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer discretionary spending tends to decline when stress and urgent repair needs rise.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly search volume rises 25% above 4-week moving average
trade_logic.exit: When search volume returns below 10% above moving average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Appliance issues spike seasonally and with weather changes, causing frequent search surges.

idea: Labor jobs posting drop coupled with Google Trends search for job layoffs

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for layoffs; job board postings data

behavior: A simultaneous decline in job postings and spike in layoff-related searches signals deteriorating labor demand.

market_impact.rationale: Financial sector often reacts negatively to weakening labor markets due to credit risk concerns.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly job postings drop 10% and layoff search volume rises 20% vs prior week

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Labor market fluctuations and layoff news frequently occur with weekly cadence.

idea: Weekly jump in political insider filings for technology sector executives selling shares

data.source: SEC insider filing API for technology sector

behavior: An unusual increase in insider sales by tech executives signals potential upcoming weakness or valuation concern.

market_impact.rationale: Insider selling often precedes short-term sector pullbacks or increased volatility.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly insider sales volume exceeds 2 standard deviations above 12-week average
trade_logic.exit: After 4 weeks or sales volume normalizes

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Regular insider sales reports and clustered executive sales happen frequently.

idea: Daily surge in Google Trends for urgent dental care searches lifting healthcare sector

data.source: Google Trends daily search interest for urgent dental care

behavior: Spikes in urgent dental care searches indicate stress-driven healthcare demand increasing short-term volume.

market_impact.rationale: Healthcare utilization tends to rise with consumer stress and urgent health needs.

trade_logic.entry: If daily search volume exceeds 20% above 7-day moving average
trade_logic.exit: When volume normalizes below 5% above average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Dental emergencies occur regularly, driving daily search volume fluctuations.

idea: Weekly rise in Google Trends for warehouse automation interest signals industrial demand

data.source: Google Trends weekly search interest for warehouse automation

behavior: Growing interest in warehouse automation signals rising capital expenditure expectations in industrials.

market_impact.rationale: Industrial sector benefits from investments in automation and logistics upgrades.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly search volume rises 30% above trailing 5-week average
trade_logic.exit: After 6 weeks or search volume falls below 10% above average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Weekly search trends for automation technologies fluctuate regularly with news cycles.

idea: Daily spike in Google Trends for emergency roadside assistance searches signals consumer stress

data.source: Google Trends daily search interest for emergency roadside assistance

behavior: Sudden increases in searches for roadside help show rising consumer vehicle distress, impacting discretionary spending.

market_impact.rationale: Consumer discretionary purchases often decline when vehicle repair stress spikes.

trade_logic.entry: If daily search volume jumps 25% above prior 7-day average
trade_logic.exit: When volume declines below 10% above baseline

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Vehicle emergencies and breakdowns cause frequent short-term spikes in searches.

idea: Weekly surge in local economy weirdness: sudden rise in city building permit denials
behavior: A sharp increase in denied building permits signals local regulatory tightening and construction slowdown.

market_impact.rationale: Real estate and construction sectors react negatively to local regulatory hurdles.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly denied permits exceed 40% above 12-week average
trade_logic.exit: When denial rate normalizes below 15% above average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Local permit denials vary with political cycles and economic shifts causing regular weekly signals.

idea: Daily jump in weather series high-wind alerts correlating with energy utilities demand spike
behavior: Increased high-wind days drive energy demand for utilities and grid stability services.

market_impact.rationale: Utilities sector benefits from weather-driven demand surges for power and resilience.

trade_logic.entry: If daily high-wind alert counts exceed 50% above 14-day average
trade_logic.exit: When alert counts normalize below 10% above average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Weather volatility and wind events frequently fluctuate day-to-day.

idea: Weekly surge in Google Trends for used car price searches signaling consumer cost pressure

behavior: Rising interest in used car prices reflects consumer cost pressures and substitution away from new vehicles.

market_impact.rationale: Discretionary auto spending often slows when consumer stress pushes toward used cars.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly search volume rises 20% above 6-week average
trade_logic.exit: When volume falls below 5% above average

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Used car price interest fluctuates regularly with market conditions and news.

idea: Weekly rise in macro input pressure: FRED producer price index spike signals inflation stress
behavior: A rising producer price index signals increasing input costs that pressure margins across sectors.

market_impact.rationale: Materials sector margins compress when input inflation spikes sharply.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly PPI increase exceeds 0.3% month-over-month
trade_logic.exit: When PPI growth slows below 0.1% monthly

reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: PPI data updates regularly with inflation dynamics causing repeat signals.

behavior: Increased flu symptom search activity predicts higher healthcare utilization and pharmaceutical sales.

market_impact.rationale: Healthcare sector benefits from spikes in illness-related demand.

trade_logic.entry: If daily search volume exceeds 25% above 7-day average
trade_logic.exit: When volume normalizes below 10% above average
